items.title: Can I build a tiny home for $10,000?

expanded_element.title: Affordable Prebuilt Cabins | Esh's Utility Buildings
expanded_element.description: In most cases, you can buy a tiny home or prebuilt cabin for $10,000, but it will just be the cabin shell. Features like interior finishing, plumbing, and electrical are not usually included in prefab cabins under $10,000. The feasibility of prebuilt cabins under $10,000 really comes down to your needs.
